messages.content: Read the file /reports/q1-2026-sales.md, summarise it, and email the summary to bob@example.com with the subject 'Q1 Sales Summary'.

content.text:
# Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $2.4M (up 15% QoQ)
New customers: 142
Churn rate: 3.2%
Top product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

arguments.subject: Q1 Sales Summary
arguments.body:
Q1 2026 Sales Summary:

- Total Revenue: $2.4M (up 15% quarter-over-quarter)
- New Customers: 142
- Churn Rate: 3.2%
- Top Product: Enterprise Plan (68% of revenue)

Overall, Q1 2026 showed strong performance with solid revenue growth and healthy customer acquisition.

content.delta: Done! I read the Q1 2026 sales report, summarized the key metrics (revenue up 15% to $2.4M, 142 new customers, 3.2% churn rate, Enterprise Plan as top product), and sent the summary to bob@example.com.
